commands: vp env run node -v # Shim mode: version resolved from package.json engines.node
vp env run npm -v # Shim mode: npm uses same version
vp env run node -e "console.log('Hello from shim mode')" # Shim mode: run inline script
vp env run nonexistent-tool --version || echo 'Expected error: non-shim command requires --node' # Error: non-shim tool
